I wrote “my child smiled today” as one of my gratitudes. But what if that smile was a mask? What if they’re hiding how much they’re hurting because they don’t want to worry me? How do I create space for their truth without overwhelming them—or myself?

I’m trying to believe that rest is part of healing—but what if my exhaustion is so deep that even this bath and meditation feel like chores? How do I reconnect with self-care when it stops feeling like sanctuary and starts feeling like another task on my to-do list?
